label: Tattoo
description: Defines a face or body tattoo style for humanlike pawns. Inherits shared style item fields and adds tattoo placement and north-facing visibility.

tattooType.label: Tattoo type
tattooType.description: Whether this tattoo is drawn on the pawn head/face or body. Face tattoos use the pawn head graphic as a render mask; body tattoos use the pawn body graphic.

visibleNorth.label: Visible north
visibleNorth.description: Whether this tattoo is visible when the pawn faces north. Defaults to true in source. Face tattoos commonly set this to false.

basic-face-tattoo.label: Basic face tattoo
basic-face-tattoo.description: Face tattoo with a texture, category, and style tags.

basic-body-tattoo.label: Basic body tattoo
basic-body-tattoo.description: Body tattoo with a texture, category, and style tags.

no-graphic-tattoo.label: No-graphic tattoo
no-graphic-tattoo.description: Tattoo placeholder with no texture, used for the no-tattoo slot.
